Class Population<G>

java.lang.Object
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.Population<G>
Type Parameters:
G - genotype value type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<Individual<G>>
public final class Population<G> extends Object implements Iterable<Individual<G>>
Mutable population aggregate with helper methods used by algorithms and metrics.
